name: GOLFTEC North Dallas
address: 5290 Belt Line Rd Suite 122, Addison, TX 75254
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training studio specializing in personalized lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions using advanced technology. The facilities utilize OPTIMOTION motion capture systems, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and improvement strategies. Their services are designed for golfers of all skill levels, with a focus on structured programs that include swing evaluations, custom lesson plans, and access to training bays for practice. Pricing is structured around lessons and packages, with an option for practice memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides precise, data-driven feedback
Personalized lesson plans and improvement strategies tailored to individual goals
Access to training bays for structured practice sessions with coach guidance

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for club fitting and practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you can use your own if preferred. Club fittings use launch monitors to match you with the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned, and there are no references to outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator practice sessions focus on skill development rather than full 18-hole rounds, with structured training plans guided by coaches.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and has been recognized for its coaching of younger golfers, with technology tailored to help juniors see and understand their progress.
